Give me the names of every artist from Sweden. Use a SQL query.

function.name: run_query
function.arguments: {"query": "SELECT a.Name FROM Artist a JOIN Album al ON al.ArtistId = a.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId WHERE a.Name IN (SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM Artist) AND a.ArtistId IN (SELECT ArtistId FROM Album)"}
